creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ak
Date: Wed Feb  5 12:50:20 2014
New Revision: 342691
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/342691
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r342691/

Log:
  - Fix issue regarding some keys with Firefox (upstream Issue 202)
  
  PR:	ports/186399
  Submitted by:	Olivier Cochard-Labbe <olivier@cochard.me> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/www/shellinabox/files/patch-vt100.jspp   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/shellinabox/Makefile

Modified: head/www/shellinabox/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/shellinabox/Makefile	Wed Feb  5 12:00:53 2014	(r342690)
+++ head/www/shellinabox/Makefile	Wed Feb  5 12:50:20 2014	(r342691)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	shellinabox
 PORTVERSION=	2.14
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTREVISION=	4
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 

Added: head/www/shellinabox/files/patch-vt100.jspp
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/shellinabox/files/patch-vt100.jspp	Wed Feb  5 12:50:20 2014	(r342691)
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+--- shellinabox/vt100.jspp.orig	2014-02-02 18:01:56.561501876 +0100
++++ shellinabox/vt100.jspp	2014-02-02 18:03:13.308497522 +0100
+@@ -2894,10 +2894,10 @@
+     event.keyCode == 226;
+   var normalKey                 =
+     alphNumKey                                   ||
+-    event.keyCode ==  59 || event.keyCode ==  61 ||
++    event.keyCode >=  59 && event.keyCode <=  64 ||
+     event.keyCode == 106 || event.keyCode == 107 ||
+     event.keyCode >= 109 && event.keyCode <= 111 ||
+-    event.keyCode >= 186 && event.keyCode <= 192 ||
++    event.keyCode >= 160 && event.keyCode <= 192 ||
+     event.keyCode >= 219 && event.keyCode <= 223 ||
+     event.keyCode == 252;
+   try {
